title: Ya`el #3278
definition:
Jael = "mountain goat"

 1) the wife of Heber the Kenite who killed the general Sisera as he
    slept by driving a peg through his temples into the ground
nasbUsage:

 1) the wife of Heber the Kenite who killed the general Sisera as he
    slept by driving a peg through his temples into the ground
